records.title: Software Developers — U.S. Employment, 2026 Q2
records.summary: U.S. employment for software developers grew 3.1% year-over-year in 2026 Q2, per BLS employment projections; net hiring remained positive despite Q1 layoff waves.

records.title: Data Scientists — U.S. Employment, 2026 Q2
records.summary: Data scientist employment expanded 5.6% year-over-year in 2026 Q2 with continued demand concentrated in healthcare, finance, and public-sector analytics.
